title: Notification dated 28-07-2022 conferred by The Notaries Act, 1952
description: Notification dated 28-07-2022 conferred by The Notaries Act, 1952
text: रजिस्ट्री सं. डी.एल.- 33004/99 REGD. No. D. L.-33004/99 xxxGIDHxxx xxxGIDExxx असाधारण EXTRAORDINARY भाग II—खण्ड 3—उप-खण्ड (i) PART II—Section 3—Sub-section (i) प्र ाजधकार से प्र काजित PUBLISHED BY AUTHORITY MINISTRY OF LAW AND JUSTICE (Department of Legal Affairs) CORRIGENDUM New Delhi, the 28th July, 2022 G.S.R. 606(E).—In the English version of the notification of the Government of India in the Ministry of Law and Justice (Department of Legal Affairs) number G.S.R. 597(E), dated the 22nd July, 2022, published in the Gazette of India, Part II, Section 3, Sub-section (i), dated the 22nd July, 2022, in line 6, for the word “for”, read “in”. [F. No. 15011/6/2022-NC] SUNITA ANAND, Jt. Secy. & Legal Advisor 5105 GI/2022 Uploaded by Dte. of Printing at Government of India Press, Ring Road, Mayapuri, New Delhi-110064 and Published by the Controller of Publications, Delhi-110054. सं. 533] नई दिल्ली , बृहस्ट्प जतवार, िुलाई 28, 2022/श्रावण 6, 1944 No. 533] NEW DELHI, THURSDAY, JULY 28, 2022/SHRAVANA 6, 1944 सी.जी.-डी.एल.-अ.-28072022-237647 CG-DL-E-28072022-237647 MANOJ KUMAR VERMA Digitally signed by MANOJ KUMAR VERMA Date: 2022.07.28 20:15:40 +05'30' -- 1 of 1 --
